metadata.title: Sneaky Mid Push Leads to a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a smart mid push catch enemies off guard with two quick headshots. Timing and positioning make all the difference in this close fight.
What’s your favorite sneaky route in VALORANT?

Drop your best mid push moment in the comments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
